RepurpOS

Lung Cancer

Disease intelligence for Lung Cancer: 133 alterations and 465 ranked therapeutics from curated public databases.

Sources: Open Targets, HPO, ClinicalTrials.gov, DGIdb, ChEMBL, PubMed Literature, PubMed NP, ClinicalTrials.gov NP · Pipeline phase 7 · Updated 2026-07-05

Remission & chronicity

Spontaneous remission
Spontaneous regression is rare (<0.5% of cases); 5-year survival without treatment: <5% for advanced NSCLC; ~20% for stage I-II with surgery
Best-intervention remission
NSCLC with driver mutations (EGFR, ALK, ROS1, MET, KRAS G12C): targeted therapy achieves 70-90% response rates; PFS 16-19 months with osimertinib (FLAURA2 combination up to 25 months); immunotherapy (pembrolizumab): 5-year OS ~31% in high PD-L1 expressers vs ~16% chemotherapy; SBRT for early-stage inoperable: 80-90% local control at 3 years
Drug-free remission
—
Relapse after remission
—
Chronicity
—
Gap size
Very large between targeted/immunotherapy eligible and chemotherapy-only; large between treated and screened populations
Primary barrier
access/practice
Barrier detail: Biomarker testing (PD-L1, EGFR/ALK/ROS1 mutations) still not universal; only 5-6% of high-risk smokers undergo low-dose CT screening despite 20% mortality reduction (NLST trial); smoking cessation dramatically reduces incidence but is underfunded

Last SoC change: 2023 — osimertinib adjuvant ADAURA (Stage IB-IIIA EGFR+ NSCLC) standard of care; neoadjuvant chemo-immunotherapy (CheckMate 816) plus surgery now standard for resectable stage III; PD-1/PD-L1 inhibitors first-line since 2016-2018; targeted therapy since 2010 (erlotinib)

Remission data layers: disease_db_100 · source-locked manual data · confidence: high

Identifiers: MONDO: MONDO:0008903 · ORPHA: ORPHA:289539

Therapeutics

Direct disease associations, biomarker-linked drugs, OSMF narrative-review natural agents, merged ranking, and clinical trial / literature evidence (top agents)

DrugTypePhaseEvidence ScoreTrials & literatureSourcesLinks
NICOTINE Small molecule Approved Strong 100
8 trials 7 Cochrane 13 Meta-analysis 51 Trial pubs 45 RCT
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT00310141 — Computer-Assisted Counseling in Helping African American Smokers Stop Smoking (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT07111936 — Evaluating the Impact of CONNECT in a Multilingual Population (NOT_YET_RECRUITING) NA
  • NCT01434342 — Feasibility of Delivering a Quitline Based Smoking Cessation Intervention in Cancer Patients (COMPLETED) EARLY_PHASE1
  • NCT03200236 — The Lung Screening, Tobacco and Health Project (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT00957424 — Acceptability of Less Harmful Alternatives to Cigarettes (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT04616768 — PROStep: A Feasibility Trial Using PROs and Step Data to Monitor Patients With Lung and GI Cancers (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT02658032 — Personalized Intervention Program: Tobacco Treatment for Patients at Risk for Lung Cancer (PIP) (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT01176383 — Impact of a Gene Test for Susceptibility to Lung Cancer in Smokers (COMPLETED) NA

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Electronic cigarettes for smoking cessation: An overview of systematic reviews and evidence and gap map (Addiction (Abingdon, England), 2026)
  • Cochrane review Health impacts of passive exposure to alternative tobacco products: a systematic review (Respiratory medicine, 2026)
  • Cochrane review Interventions for smoking cessation in people diagnosed with lung cancer (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2019)
  • Cochrane review A Systematic Review of Effects of Waterpipe Smoking on Cardiovascular and Respiratory Health Outcomes (Tobacco use insights, 2016)
  • Cochrane review Benefits of E-Cigarettes Among Heavy Smokers Undergoing a Lung Cancer Screening Program: Randomized Controlled Trial Protocol (JMIR research protocols, 2016)
  • Meta-analysis Tar level of cigarettes smoked and risk of smoking-related diseases (Inhalation toxicology, 2018)
  • Meta-analysis Genome-wide association study across European and African American ancestries identifies a SNP in DNMT3B contributing to nicotine dependence (Molecular psychiatry, 2018)
  • Meta-analysis Genetic Risk Can Be Decreased: Quitting Smoking Decreases and Delays Lung Cancer for Smokers With High and Low CHRNA5 Risk Genotypes - A Meta-Analysis (EBioMedicine, 2016)
  • Meta-analysis Genome-wide meta-analysis reveals common splice site acceptor variant in CHRNA4 associated with nicotine dependence (Translational psychiatry, 2015)
  • Meta-analysis Rare, low frequency and common coding variants in CHRNA5 and their contribution to nicotine dependence in European and African Americans (Molecular psychiatry, 2016)
  • Systematic review Evidence on vaping e-cigarettes as a risk factor for cancer: A systematic review (Journal of cancer policy, 2025)
  • Systematic review Genome Wide Association Studies in Small-Cell Lung Cancer. A Systematic Review (Clinical lung cancer, 2024)

Registry trials

Published literature

  • Clinical trial publication A phase Ib trial of continuous once-daily oral afatinib plus sirolimus in patients with epidermal growth factor receptor mutation-positive non-small cell lung cancer and/or disease progression following prior erlotinib or gefitinib (Lung cancer (Amsterdam, Netherlands), 2017)
  • Clinical trial publication Sirolimus plus prednisone for Erdheim-Chester disease: an open-label trial (Blood, 2015)
  • Clinical trial publication Revisiting clinical trials using EGFR inhibitor-based regimens in patients with advanced non-small cell lung cancer: a retrospective analysis of an MD Anderson Cancer Center phase I population (Oncotarget, 2013)
  • Clinical trial publication A Phase 1 clinical study of temsirolimus (CCI-779) in Japanese patients with advanced solid tumors (Japanese journal of clinical oncology, 2010)
  • Clinical trial publication Phase I trial of sirolimus combined with radiation and cisplatin in non-small cell lung cancer (Journal of thoracic oncology : official publication of the International Association for the Study of Lung Cancer, 2007)

Published literature

  • Meta-analysis Group I pharmaceuticals of IARC and associated cancer risks: systematic review and meta-analysis (Scientific reports, 2024)
  • Meta-analysis Iodopovidone pleurodesis for malignant pleural effusions: an updated systematic review and meta-analysis (Supportive care in cancer : official journal of the Multinational Association of Supportive Care in Cancer, 2021)
  • Meta-analysis 15q12 variants, sputum gene promoter hypermethylation, and lung cancer risk: a GWAS in smokers (Journal of the National Cancer Institute, 2015)
  • Meta-analysis Herbal extract elemene intrathoracic injection in the treatment of lung cancer patients with malignant pleural effusion: a meta-anaylsis (Journal of cancer research and therapeutics, 2014)
  • Systematic review Intrapericardial instillation of bleomycin prevents recurrence of malignant pericardial effusions: Series of 46 cases and comprehensive literature review (Bulletin du cancer, 2020)
  • Clinical trial publication Ablation of soft tissue tumours by long needle variable electrode-geometry electrochemotherapy: final report from a single-arm, single-centre phase-2 study (Scientific reports, 2020)
  • Clinical trial publication Telomerase and telomere length in pulmonary fibrosis (American journal of respiratory cell and molecular biology, 2013)
  • Clinical trial publication A randomised trial of intrapericardial bleomycin for malignant pericardial effusion with lung cancer (JCOG9811) (British journal of cancer, 2009)
  • Clinical trial publication Randomized phase II trial of three intrapleural therapy regimens for the management of malignant pleural effusion in previously untreated non-small cell lung cancer: JCOG 9515 (Lung cancer (Amsterdam, Netherlands), 2007)
  • Clinical trial publication Catheter drainage followed by the instillation of bleomycin to manage malignant pericardial effusion in non-small cell lung cancer: a multi-institutional phase II trial (Journal of thoracic oncology : official publication of the International Association for the Study of Lung Cancer, 2007)
  • Randomized controlled trial Mutagen sensitivity may predict lung protection by amifostine for patients with locally advanced non-small cell lung cancer treated by chemoradiotherapy (Seminars in oncology, 2005)
  • Randomized controlled trial [Pleurodesis in malignant pleural effusion: bleomycin vs. mitoxantrone] (Pneumologie (Stuttgart, Germany), 1997)

  • Clinical trial publication The Phase 3 KEYLYNK-006 Study of Pembrolizumab Plus Olaparib Versus Pembrolizumab Plus Pemetrexed as Maintenance Therapy for Metastatic Nonsquamous NSCLC (Journal of thoracic oncology : official publication of the International Association for the Study of Lung Cancer, 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication Adavosertib in Combination with Olaparib in Patients with Refractory Solid Tumors: An Open-Label, Dose-Finding, and Dose-Expansion Phase Ib Trial (Targeted oncology, 2024)
  • Randomized controlled trial Olaparib maintenance versus placebo in platinum-sensitive non-small cell lung cancer: the Phase 2 randomized PIPSeN trial (British journal of cancer, 2024)
  • Randomized controlled trial Olaparib as maintenance treatment in patients with chemosensitive small cell lung cancer (STOMP): A randomised, double-blind, placebo-controlled phase II trial (Lung cancer (Amsterdam, Netherlands), 2022)
  • Randomized controlled trial Comprehensive Genome Profiling in Patients With Metastatic Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer: The Precision Medicine Phase II Randomized SAFIR02-Lung/IFCT 1301 Trial (Clinical cancer research : an official journal of the American Association for Cancer Research, 2022)
  • Randomized controlled trial Combination of gefitinib and olaparib versus gefitinib alone in EGFR mutant non-small-cell lung cancer (NSCLC): A multicenter, randomized phase II study (GOAL) (Lung cancer (Amsterdam, Netherlands), 2020)

Published literature

  • Cochrane review The clinical effectiveness and cost-effectiveness of cetuximab (mono- or combination chemotherapy), bevacizumab (combination with non-oxaliplatin chemotherapy) and panitumumab (monotherapy) for the treatment of metastatic colorectal cancer after first-line chemotherapy (review of technology appraisal No.150 and part review of technology appraisal No. 118): a systematic review and economic model (Health technology assessment (Winchester, England), 2013)
  • Cochrane review [Vinorelbine plus oxaliplatin versus vinorelbine plus cisplatin for advanced non-small cell lung cancer: a systematic review] (Zhongguo fei ai za zhi = Chinese journal of lung cancer, 2010)

  • Meta-analysis The intrapleural administration with thymic peptides in malignant pleural effusion: A clusteredsystematicreview and meta-analysis (International immunopharmacology, 2022)
  • Meta-analysis The association between copper transporters and the prognosis of cancer patients undergoing chemotherapy: a meta-analysis of literatures and datasets (Oncotarget, 2017)
  • Meta-analysis Oxaliplatin-Based Doublets Versus Cisplatin or Carboplatin-Based Doublets in the First-Line Treatment of Advanced Nonsmall Cell Lung Cancer (Medicine, 2015)
  • Meta-analysis [Oxaliplatin: the first DACH platinum in clinical practice] (Bulletin du cancer, 1997)
  • Systematic review Genetic Polymorphisms and Platinum-Based Chemotherapy-Induced Toxicities in Patients With Lung Cancer: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis (Frontiers in oncology, 2019)
  • Clinical trial publication Trilaciclib prior to FOLFOXIRI/bevacizumab for patients with untreated metastatic colorectal cancer: phase 3 PRESERVE 1 trial (JNCI cancer spectrum, 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication Phase I Study of ROR1-Specific CAR-T Cells in Advanced Hematopoietic and Epithelial Malignancies (Clinical cancer research : an official journal of the American Association for Cancer Research, 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication Phase II Study of Preoperative Chemoradiotherapy With S-1 Plus Oxaliplatin for Locally Advanced Rectal Cancer (PerSeUS-RC01) (Anticancer research, 2021)
  • Clinical trial publication A multicenter phase II study of docetaxel, oxaliplatin, and bevacizumab in first-line therapy for unresectable locally advanced or metastatic non-squamous cell histology non-small-cell lung cancer (NSCLC) (Cancer chemotherapy and pharmacology, 2013)

View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT00310141 — Computer-Assisted Counseling in Helping African American Smokers Stop Smoking (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT07111936 — Evaluating the Impact of CONNECT in a Multilingual Population (NOT_YET_RECRUITING) NA
  • NCT01434342 — Feasibility of Delivering a Quitline Based Smoking Cessation Intervention in Cancer Patients (COMPLETED) EARLY_PHASE1
  • NCT03200236 — The Lung Screening, Tobacco and Health Project (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT00957424 — Acceptability of Less Harmful Alternatives to Cigarettes (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT04616768 — PROStep: A Feasibility Trial Using PROs and Step Data to Monitor Patients With Lung and GI Cancers (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT02658032 — Personalized Intervention Program: Tobacco Treatment for Patients at Risk for Lung Cancer (PIP) (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT01176383 — Impact of a Gene Test for Susceptibility to Lung Cancer in Smokers (COMPLETED) NA

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Electronic cigarettes for smoking cessation: An overview of systematic reviews and evidence and gap map (Addiction (Abingdon, England), 2026)
  • Cochrane review Health impacts of passive exposure to alternative tobacco products: a systematic review (Respiratory medicine, 2026)
  • Cochrane review Interventions for smoking cessation in people diagnosed with lung cancer (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2019)
  • Cochrane review A Systematic Review of Effects of Waterpipe Smoking on Cardiovascular and Respiratory Health Outcomes (Tobacco use insights, 2016)
  • Cochrane review Benefits of E-Cigarettes Among Heavy Smokers Undergoing a Lung Cancer Screening Program: Randomized Controlled Trial Protocol (JMIR research protocols, 2016)
  • Meta-analysis Tar level of cigarettes smoked and risk of smoking-related diseases (Inhalation toxicology, 2018)
  • Meta-analysis Genome-wide association study across European and African American ancestries identifies a SNP in DNMT3B contributing to nicotine dependence (Molecular psychiatry, 2018)
  • Meta-analysis Genetic Risk Can Be Decreased: Quitting Smoking Decreases and Delays Lung Cancer for Smokers With High and Low CHRNA5 Risk Genotypes - A Meta-Analysis (EBioMedicine, 2016)
  • Meta-analysis Genome-wide meta-analysis reveals common splice site acceptor variant in CHRNA4 associated with nicotine dependence (Translational psychiatry, 2015)
  • Meta-analysis Rare, low frequency and common coding variants in CHRNA5 and their contribution to nicotine dependence in European and African Americans (Molecular psychiatry, 2016)
  • Systematic review Evidence on vaping e-cigarettes as a risk factor for cancer: A systematic review (Journal of cancer policy, 2025)
  • Systematic review Genome Wide Association Studies in Small-Cell Lung Cancer. A Systematic Review (Clinical lung cancer, 2024)

Published literature

  • Clinical trial publication A phase Ib trial of continuous once-daily oral afatinib plus sirolimus in patients with epidermal growth factor receptor mutation-positive non-small cell lung cancer and/or disease progression following prior erlotinib or gefitinib (Lung cancer (Amsterdam, Netherlands), 2017)
  • Clinical trial publication Sirolimus plus prednisone for Erdheim-Chester disease: an open-label trial (Blood, 2015)
  • Clinical trial publication Revisiting clinical trials using EGFR inhibitor-based regimens in patients with advanced non-small cell lung cancer: a retrospective analysis of an MD Anderson Cancer Center phase I population (Oncotarget, 2013)
  • Clinical trial publication A Phase 1 clinical study of temsirolimus (CCI-779) in Japanese patients with advanced solid tumors (Japanese journal of clinical oncology, 2010)
  • Clinical trial publication Phase I trial of sirolimus combined with radiation and cisplatin in non-small cell lung cancer (Journal of thoracic oncology : official publication of the International Association for the Study of Lung Cancer, 2007)

Registry trials

  • NCT05427136 — Early Pulmonary Dysfunction in Childhood Cancer Patients (RECRUITING)
  • NCT00165438 — Pulmonary Function in Patients With Hodgkin's Disease Receiving Bleomycin-Based Chemotherapy (COMPLETED)
  • NCT01660399 — Clinical Trial of Boanmycin Hydrochloride With Docetaxel for Patients With Lung Squamous Cell Cancer as Chemotherapy (UNKNOWN) PHASE2
  • NCT00132613 — Trial of Drainage With or Without Bleomycin Instillation for Malignant Pericardial Effusion (COMPLETED) PHASE3

Published literature

  • Meta-analysis Group I pharmaceuticals of IARC and associated cancer risks: systematic review and meta-analysis (Scientific reports, 2024)
  • Meta-analysis Iodopovidone pleurodesis for malignant pleural effusions: an updated systematic review and meta-analysis (Supportive care in cancer : official journal of the Multinational Association of Supportive Care in Cancer, 2021)
  • Meta-analysis 15q12 variants, sputum gene promoter hypermethylation, and lung cancer risk: a GWAS in smokers (Journal of the National Cancer Institute, 2015)
  • Meta-analysis Herbal extract elemene intrathoracic injection in the treatment of lung cancer patients with malignant pleural effusion: a meta-anaylsis (Journal of cancer research and therapeutics, 2014)
  • Systematic review Intrapericardial instillation of bleomycin prevents recurrence of malignant pericardial effusions: Series of 46 cases and comprehensive literature review (Bulletin du cancer, 2020)
  • Clinical trial publication Ablation of soft tissue tumours by long needle variable electrode-geometry electrochemotherapy: final report from a single-arm, single-centre phase-2 study (Scientific reports, 2020)
  • Clinical trial publication Telomerase and telomere length in pulmonary fibrosis (American journal of respiratory cell and molecular biology, 2013)
  • Clinical trial publication A randomised trial of intrapericardial bleomycin for malignant pericardial effusion with lung cancer (JCOG9811) (British journal of cancer, 2009)
  • Clinical trial publication Randomized phase II trial of three intrapleural therapy regimens for the management of malignant pleural effusion in previously untreated non-small cell lung cancer: JCOG 9515 (Lung cancer (Amsterdam, Netherlands), 2007)
  • Clinical trial publication Catheter drainage followed by the instillation of bleomycin to manage malignant pericardial effusion in non-small cell lung cancer: a multi-institutional phase II trial (Journal of thoracic oncology : official publication of the International Association for the Study of Lung Cancer, 2007)
  • Randomized controlled trial Mutagen sensitivity may predict lung protection by amifostine for patients with locally advanced non-small cell lung cancer treated by chemoradiotherapy (Seminars in oncology, 2005)
  • Randomized controlled trial [Pleurodesis in malignant pleural effusion: bleomycin vs. mitoxantrone] (Pneumologie (Stuttgart, Germany), 1997)

Published literature

  • Cochrane review A Scoping Review to Evaluate Different Treatments Used in Advanced Nonsmall-cell Lung Cancer in India (Indian journal of public health, 2026)
  • Cochrane review Osimertinib Efficacy and Safety in Treating Epidermal Growth Factor Receptor Mutation-Positive Advanced Non-Small-Cell Lung Cancer: A Meta-Analysis (Clinical pharmacology in drug development, 2025)

  • Clinical trial publication The Phase 3 KEYLYNK-006 Study of Pembrolizumab Plus Olaparib Versus Pembrolizumab Plus Pemetrexed as Maintenance Therapy for Metastatic Nonsquamous NSCLC (Journal of thoracic oncology : official publication of the International Association for the Study of Lung Cancer, 2025)

  • Randomized controlled trial Olaparib as maintenance treatment in patients with chemosensitive small cell lung cancer (STOMP): A randomised, double-blind, placebo-controlled phase II trial (Lung cancer (Amsterdam, Netherlands), 2022)
  • Randomized controlled trial Comprehensive Genome Profiling in Patients With Metastatic Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer: The Precision Medicine Phase II Randomized SAFIR02-Lung/IFCT 1301 Trial (Clinical cancer research : an official journal of the American Association for Cancer Research, 2022)
  • Randomized controlled trial Combination of gefitinib and olaparib versus gefitinib alone in EGFR mutant non-small-cell lung cancer (NSCLC): A multicenter, randomized phase II study (GOAL) (Lung cancer (Amsterdam, Netherlands), 2020)

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Metronomic chemotherapy combined with immunotherapy in solid tumor: a systematic review (Translational cancer research, 2026)
  • Cochrane review A meta-analysis of recombinant human endostatin combined with NP regimen for treating non-small cell lung cancer (Medicine, 2024)
  • Cochrane review Effect of the STK11 mutation on therapeutic efficacy and prognosis in patients with non-small cell lung cancer: a comprehensive study based on meta-analyses and bioinformatics analyses (BMC cancer, 2024)
  • Cochrane review Quantitative comparison of the efficacies and safety profiles of three first-line non-platinum chemotherapy regimens for advanced non-small cell lung cancer (Frontiers in pharmacology, 2022)
  • Cochrane review A network meta-analysis for efficacies and toxicities of different concurrent chemoradiotherapy regimens in the treatment of locally advanced non-small cell lung cancer (BMC cancer, 2022)
  • Meta-analysis Investigation of the optimal platinum-based regimen in the postoperative adjuvant chemotherapy setting for early-stage resected non-small lung cancer: a Bayesian network meta-analysis (BMJ open, 2022)
  • Meta-analysis Concurrent chemoradiotherapy with cisplatin + S-1 versus cisplatin + other third-generation agents for locally advanced non-small-cell lung cancer: a meta-analysis of individual participant data (BMC pulmonary medicine, 2022)
  • Systematic review Efficacy and safety of first-line carboplatin-versus cisplatin-based chemotherapy for non-small cell lung cancer: A meta-analysis (Lung cancer (Amsterdam, Netherlands), 2019)
  • Systematic review Effectiveness and safety of chemotherapy with cytokine-induced killer cells in non-small cell lung cancer: A systematic review and meta-analysis of 32 randomized controlled trials (Cytotherapy, 2019)
  • Systematic review Hypofractionated Concomitant Chemoradiation in Inoperable Locally Advanced Non-small Cell Lung Cancer: A Report on 100 Patients and a Systematic Review (Clinical oncology (Royal College of Radiologists (Great Britain)), 2019)
  • Systematic review Oral vinorelbine-based concomitant chemoradiotherapy in unresectable stage III non-small cell lung cancer: a systematic review (Expert review of anticancer therapy, 2018)
  • Clinical trial publication Ten-year overall survival in resectable stage-III NSCLC - Results of the randomized ESPATUE trial - Long-term survival and competing risk analysis (European journal of cancer (Oxford, England : 1990), 2026)

Alterations and therapeutics are aggregated from public databases (Open Targets, HPO, ChEMBL, DGIdb, and others). Natural agents are candidates from OSMF narrative reviews on opensourcemed.info/chronic-disease.html — not approved treatments. This page is for research orientation only — not medical advice.
